Stockwell reports receipt of National Institutes of Health (NIH) grants on COVID-19 vaccine and subcontract funding on long COVID originating from NIH, receipt of consulting fees from RTI International for administrative functions related to the NIH RECOVER initiative, and a service agreement for her role as associate director of the American Academy of Pediatrics’ Pediatric Research in Office Settings. Zachary A. Weber reports receipt of grant or contract funding from Novavax through payments to his employer (Westat, Inc.). Ousseny Zerbo reports receipt of grant or contract funding from NIH, Moderna, and Pfizer for research unrelated to the current manuscript. No other potential conflicts of interest were disclosed.
